sentences.english: When I first started learning Korean I thought it would be impossible.
sentences.korean: 처음 한국어를 배우기 시작했을 때 불가능할 거라고 생각했어요.

sentences.english: The alphabet looked so different from English.
But once I learned Hangul I realized it's actually very logical and easy to read.
sentences.korean: 하지만 한글을 배우고 나니 사실 매우 논리적이고 읽기 쉽다는 걸 깨달았어요.

sentences.english: The hardest part is the grammar because the sentence order is completely different from English.
sentences.korean: 가장 어려운 부분은 문법인데 문장 순서가 영어와 완전히 다르기 때문이에요.

sentences.english: Watching K-dramas without subtitles is my ultimate goal.
sentences.korean: 자막 없이 K-드라마를 보는 것이 궁극적인 목표예요.
